KHAS Short Film Competition: Organized for the Second Time This Year with the Theme “Dream”!

The theme of this year’s KHAS Short Film Competition organized by Kadir Has University Department of Radio, Television and Cinema is “Dream.” Cinema deals with layers of reality, imagination and dreams; it is interested in playing with these layers, rebuilding and disrupting them by expanding the boundaries of time and space. We invite our participants to explore the creative possibilities offered by cinema based on this concept.

📅Last Application Date: September 1, 2025

🎓 Who Can Participate? Anyone who is an undergraduate or graduate student at a university in Turkey

💻 For application and detailed information: kisafilm.khas.edu.tr

The winning films will be evaluated by a distinguished jury and will be screened at a special screening. The awards to be given to the winners are as follows:

Second Prize 30.000 ₺

Third Prize 20.000 ₺

We invite all university students who want to discover the connection between cinema and imagination and turn their own dreams into movies to this exciting adventure.
